message:
🧹 Remove unused production deps: react-is, isomorphic-dompurify (#10311)

Neither package is imported anywhere in the codebase:
- react-is: no imports found (grep confirms zero references)
- isomorphic-dompurify: superseded by dompurify (which remains)

Reduces install footprint and avoids phantom dep confusion.

Fixes #10310

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
